title: Filter Overhaul
instruction: Review your inbox and set up a comprehensive filter system. Browse your Primary, Promotions, and Updates tabs to identify recurring patterns. Then go to Settings > Filters. You will see three existing filters — one of them has the wrong domain (it should match billing-services.test but currently matches something else). Delete the broken filter and recreate it with the correct domain, setting it to archive and label 'Billing'. Then create three additional filters: one that stars emails with 'Security Advisory' in the subject and labels them 'Security', one that archives emails from marketing-blasts.test and marks them read, and one that forwards emails from nina.singh@executive.test to chief-of-staff@webagentbench.test. Do not delete the two correct existing filters.
eval_check_descriptions: Fixed filter created with correct domain

emails.subject: Board prep materials — confidential
emails.body:
Sharing the board prep materials ahead of next week's meeting. Please keep these confidential and route through my chief of staff.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.body:
A critical vulnerability has been identified in the authentication module. Please review the attached advisory and apply patches within 48 hours.

Thanks,
Security Team
